rationale: Both notes indicate strong topical and conceptual overlap in brand-extension evaluation: the cited paper studies when decision context shifts reliance on fit versus quality, while the citing paper examines how personal control shifts fit judgments and extension acceptance. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior work on drivers of fit, which makes this cited study a plausible direct prior/comparison source rather than an incidental mention. Given this plausible substantive linkage (despite no in-text snippet), it should be retained for full relation judgment.
